_comment: CITIZEN-SCIENCE REVIEW TEMPLATE - NOT ACTIVE. See docs/THRESHOLD_CALIBRATION.md.
_requires: Operator approval with disagreements and abstentions preserved
description: v1 scoring template for unit-safe pathway probabilities and real radio noise thresholds. Pending citizen-science review.

pathway_thresholds._comment: Probability fields stay in [0, 1]. They require labeled pathway evaluation and must never be populated with SNR or drift-rate values.

snr_thresholds._comment: Fill only after the production calibration report passes all acceptance gates.

drift_rate_thresholds._comment: Fill only after the production calibration report passes all acceptance gates.

track_sensitivity._comment: Adjust weights based on per-track false positive analysis.
